landing.headline: Your professional identity. Proven. Yours.
landing.subhead: A place of your own, where your professional worth is proven, centralized and portable — for your entire career.
landing.message: You don't open an account. You establish your digital professional identity.
landing.passportCaption: An official asset, issued by Opus X.

signals.ownershipBody: Your identity belongs to you, not to the platform that feeds it.
signals.permanenceTitle: It stays with you for life
signals.permanenceBody: Your evidence remains valid and portable throughout your career.
signals.securityBody: Every piece of evidence is verified by Opus X, never merely claimed.
